title: Wbooth
compiled_truth: Wbooth is an external contact at [Booth-law](companies/booth-law). Over the corpus period (2000-08-10 to 2002-06-12), Wbooth sent 2 and received 161 emails, totalling 163 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (2), [Kmccrea](people/kmccrea-sablaw) (2), [Brbarkovich](people/brbarkovich-earthlink) (2), [Dominic Dimare](people/dominic-dimare-calchamber) (2), [Cra](people/cra-calretailers) (2).
